sentences.en: Let's set your alarm for seven o'clock.
sentences.zh: 我們把鬧鐘設定在七點吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets set jʊər əˈlɑːrm fɔːr ˈsevən əˈklɑːk/

sentences.en: Let's wash our hands before we eat.
sentences.zh: 吃飯前我們先洗手。
sentences.ipa: /lets wɑːʃ ˈaʊər hændz bɪˈfɔːr wiː iːt/

sentences.en: Let's check the water temperature first.
sentences.zh: 我們先試試水溫吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets tʃek ðə ˈwɔːtər ˈtemprətʃər fɜːrst/

sentences.en: Let's check the weather before we head out.
sentences.zh: 出門前我們看一下天氣吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets tʃek ðə ˈweðər bɪˈfɔːr wiː hed aʊt/

sentences.en: Let's play tag, I'll count to ten.
sentences.zh: 我們來玩鬼抓人，我數到十。
sentences.ipa: /lets pleɪ tæɡ aɪl kaʊnt tuː ten/

sentences.en: Don't forget your water bottle for school.
sentences.zh: 別忘了帶水壺去上學。
sentences.ipa: /doʊnt fərˈɡet jʊər ˈwɔːtər ˈbɑːtl fɔːr skuːl/

sentences.en: Let's sharpen your pencil before we start.
sentences.zh: 開始前先削好鉛筆吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ˈʃɑːrpən jʊər ˈpensəl bɪˈfɔːr wiː stɑːrt/

sentences.en: Let's sort your toys by color.
sentences.zh: 我們把玩具依顏色分類吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets sɔːrt jʊər tɔɪz baɪ ˈkʌlər/

sentences.en: It's okay to be scared, I'm here with you.
sentences.zh: 害怕沒關係，我在你身邊。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts oʊˈkeɪ tuː biː skerd aɪm hɪr wɪð juː/

sentences.en: Shouting won't get you what you want.
sentences.zh: 大叫沒辦法讓你得到想要的東西。
sentences.ipa: /ˈʃaʊtɪŋ woʊnt ɡet juː wʌt juː wɑːnt/

sentences.en: You did that all on your own, amazing!
sentences.zh: 你完全靠自己做到的，太棒了！
sentences.ipa: /juː dɪd ðæt ɔːl ɑːn jʊər oʊn əˈmeɪzɪŋ/

sentences.en: Don't run near the swimming pool.
sentences.zh: 泳池旁邊不要用跑的。
sentences.ipa: /doʊnt rʌn nɪr ðə ˈswɪmɪŋ puːl/

sentences.en: Does your tummy still hurt?
sentences.zh: 你的肚子還在痛嗎？
sentences.ipa: /dʌz jʊər ˈtʌmi stɪl hɜːrt/

sentences.en: Let's bring a snack to share at Grandma's.
sentences.zh: 我們帶點心去奶奶家分享吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets brɪŋ ə snæk tuː ʃer æt ˈɡrænmɑːz/

sentences.en: Who did you play with at the park today?
sentences.zh: 你今天在公園跟誰一起玩？
sentences.ipa: /huː dɪd juː pleɪ wɪð æt ðə pɑːrk təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Say excuse me before you interrupt.
sentences.zh: 打斷別人之前要先說不好意思。
sentences.ipa: /seɪ ɪkˈskjuːz miː bɪˈfɔːr juː ˌɪntəˈrʌpt/

sentences.en: Grab a raincoat, it's pouring outside.
sentences.zh: 拿件雨衣，外面下大雨了。
sentences.ipa: /ɡræb ə ˈreɪnkoʊt ɪts ˈpɔːrɪŋ ˈaʊtˌsaɪd/

sentences.en: Let's set a timer for your game time.
sentences.zh: 我們設定計時器來玩遊戲時間吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets set ə ˈtaɪmər fɔːr jʊər ɡeɪm taɪm/

sentences.en: Let's hang balloons for the party tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 我們掛氣球佈置明天的派對吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets hæŋ bəˈluːnz fɔːr ðə ˈpɑːrti təˈmɑːroʊ/

sentences.en: Let's read about dinosaurs tonight.
sentences.zh: 我們今晚來讀恐龍的故事吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets riːd əˈbaʊt ˈdaɪnəsɔːrz təˈnaɪt/
